width.description: A numeric or unit object specifying page width

height.description: A numeric or unit object specifying page height

default.units.description: A string indicating the default units to use if width or height are only given as numerics

bg.description: A character value indicating page background color

xgrid.description: A numeric indicating the increment by which to place vertical gridlines

ygrid.description: A numeric indicating the increment by which to place horizontal gridlines

showGuides.description: A logical value indicating whether to draw a black border around the entire page and guiding rulers along the top and left side of the page

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
